forecasts.reasoning: The window for a phone call is approximately one month (May 13 - June 15, 2025). During early 2025, President Trump and President Zelenskyy have maintained frequent direct communication amid intense, high-stakes negotiations to end the war in Ukraine. They spoke for an hour on March 19, held an in-person meeting in Rome on April 26, and had another phone call on May 8. Although recent reports from May 11 indicate tension—with Trump urging Ukraine to negotiate "now" and ignoring Kyiv's specific ceasefire demands—this high-pressure diplomatic environment typically increases the frequency of direct leader-to-leader communication rather than decreasing it. The established cadence of interacting every 2-3 weeks implies a high likelihood of another phone call occurring within the >4-week window. While there is a risk that growing friction could lead Trump to rely on intermediaries or freeze Zelenskyy out, their history of frequent direct contact makes a phone call highly probable.
